name: Anthony Towns
cooked: I now have a variation of this that’s compatible with stratumv1 ASIC mining. If anyone would like to point bitaxe-level hardware at inquisition.bitcoin-signet.net port 3333 with user set to a signet address (or tb1qr6lmcexy6285f3a04j2a75d39qvcdek739g8cz to send funds back to the mining wallet) for a day or two, you should get to see regular “block” solves, and start to received pooled payouts.
